about.title: About me
about.intro: Hey there, I'm Kajanan! I'm passionate about Information Technology and software development. Coding motivates me because it allows me to solve real problems and build practical solutions with technology. I enjoy turning ideas into functional applications and constantly improving how software works.
about.cta: Let's connect and build something impactful together.
about.location: I am located in Hamm, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, and I'm open to different ways of working, including commuting, remote work, or even relocating for the right opportunity.
about.learning: I'm very open-minded when it comes to learning new technologies and expanding my skill set. The fast pace of the tech world motivates me to keep learning, experimenting, and improving my programming abilities. I'm known for learning quickly and adapting efficiently to new tools, frameworks, and challenges.
about.problemSolving: My problem-solving approach is based on analytical thinking, creativity, and persistence. I enjoy breaking complex problems into smaller parts and finding efficient, elegant solutions. Every challenge is an opportunity for me to grow as a developer, and I strongly value collaboration and learning from others in a team environment.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: I've built projects with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Angular — always focused on clean, maintainable code. I adapt quickly to new tools and frameworks, and I actively keep up with the fast-moving frontend ecosystem.
skills.enthusiasm: I'm always excited to explore new technologies — just reach out!

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Explore a selection of my work here - Interact with projects to see my skills in action.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Got a problem to solve?
contact.description: I'm looking for a role as a Frontend Developer where I can contribute clean, well-structured code and bring real value to your team and projects.
contact.privacyText2: and agree to the processing of my data as outlined.
